tool_access.name: search_knowledge_base
tool_access.description: Searches the internal support knowledge base for relevant articles.

tool_access.name: read_ticket
tool_access.description: Reads the full contents of a support ticket including customer messages.

tool_access.name: generate_draft_response
tool_access.description: Generates a draft reply to be reviewed by a human agent before sending.

tool_access.name: tag_ticket
tool_access.description: Applies a category or priority tag to a ticket.

tool_access.name: route_ticket
tool_access.description: Routes the ticket to a specific support queue or team.

known_risks.risk: Agent reads support tickets that may contain customer PII including name, email, and account details.
known_risks.mitigation: PII is not stored beyond the scope of the run. Logs are scrubbed of customer identifiers. Data retention policy is enforced on log destination.

known_risks.risk: Draft responses may be factually incorrect or out of date if the knowledge base has not been updated.
known_risks.mitigation: All draft responses require human review and approval before sending. Knowledge base is reviewed quarterly.

known_risks.risk: Model may misclassify ticket urgency, resulting in low-priority routing of a high-severity issue.
known_risks.mitigation: Human support agents review all ticket routings. Escalation path remains available to override agent routing.
